attempt: Transfer Ticket 42's lesson: finite template probes are useful, but neither cycle absence nor bounded acyclicity proves the target while growth coordinates remain unclosed. The useful object is either a parametric lift theorem with a well-founded measure, or a compatible escaping cycle that becomes a counterexample target.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: finite zero-state template rank without height/tail growth coordinates
bounded_result.retained_target: Every off-critical zero configuration has a parametric explicit-formula template lift whose positivity measure decreases across all height extensions.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: a compatible off-critical zero-template cycle with nondecreasing positivity deficit

obstruction: The template layer can contain cycles after finite coordinates are hidden. This blocks any proof that uses only the finite quotient, but it does not produce a counterexample until the cycle is lifted to a compatible infinite object.
candidate_theorem: Every off-critical zero configuration has a parametric explicit-formula template lift whose positivity measure decreases across all height extensions.
next_experiment: Lift zero-state template cycles into explicit-formula kernel constraints and test whether any cycle can remain off the critical line.
claim_boundary: No riemann proof and no certified riemann counterexample.
